The '''''Fireater''''' was a [[DP20 gunship/Legends|DP20 gunship]] in service to the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] in [[9 ABY/Legends|9 ABY]] and stationed at [[Durren]]. It was part of a small fleet of warships hastily assembled by [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] to defend the [[Meridian sector/Legends|Meridian sector]] from invasion, along with the ''[[Courane]]''. It was destroyed by a swarm of [[Needle fighter|CCIR Needle]] craft over [[Nam Chorios/Legends|Nam Chorios]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Planet of Twilight]]'' {{1st}}
